title.en: Deploy a full-stack app with Pages + Functions
title.zh: 用 Pages + Functions 部署全端應用

subtitle.en: Host your front-end and run your back-end API in one Cloudflare Pages project
subtitle.zh: 用同一個 Cloudflare Pages 專案，同時放前端網頁、跑後端 API

tagline.en: One git repo, one deploy: static pages and an /api/* backend ship together.
tagline.zh: 一個 git repo、一次部署：靜態網頁和 /api/* 後端一起上線。

text.en: Cloudflare Pages hosts your front-end (the HTML, CSS, and JavaScript a browser downloads). Pages Functions let that SAME project also run back-end code — your API. You drop files into a functions/ folder, each file becomes an API route, and you bind a D1 database (SQL) or KV store (key-value) so the back-end can read and write data.
text.zh: Cloudflare Pages 負責放你的前端（瀏覽器會下載的 HTML、CSS、JavaScript）。而 Pages Functions（Pages 函式）讓「同一個專案」也能跑後端程式碼——也就是你的 API。你只要把檔案丟進 functions/ 資料夾，每個檔案就會自動變成一條 API 路由，再綁定 D1 資料庫（SQL）或 KV 儲存（鍵值對），後端就能讀寫資料了。

text.en: The magic is that the static site and the API live in one repository and deploy together. A request to / returns a static file; a request to /api/hello runs a Function. No separate server, no separate deploy pipeline.
text.zh: 重點在於：靜態網站和 API 住在同一個 repository（程式碼倉庫）裡、一起部署。打 / 會回傳靜態檔案；打 /api/hello 則會執行一個 Function。不用另外架伺服器，也不用維護第二條部署流程。

code.en:
flowchart TD
  USER["Browser"] --> EDGE["Cloudflare edge"]
  EDGE -->|"static path"| STATIC["Static assets (HTML/CSS/JS)"]
  EDGE -->|"/api/*"| FN["functions/api/[[route]].js"]
  STATIC -->|"calls /api/hello"| FN
  FN --> DB["D1 database (env.DB)"]
  FN --> KV["KV namespace (env.CACHE)"]
code.zh:
flowchart TD
  USER["瀏覽器"] --> EDGE["Cloudflare 邊緣節點"]
  EDGE -->|"靜態路徑"| STATIC["靜態檔案 (HTML/CSS/JS)"]
  EDGE -->|"/api/*"| FN["functions/api/[[route]].js"]
  STATIC -->|"呼叫 /api/hello"| FN
  FN --> DB["D1 資料庫 (env.DB)"]
  FN --> KV["KV 命名空間 (env.CACHE)"]

text.en: A shop with a storefront and a back office under one roof. The storefront (static pages) is what customers see; the back office (Functions) handles orders and talks to the filing cabinet (D1/KV). One building, one set of keys, one address.
text.zh: 一間「前面是店面、後面是辦公室」的店，全在同一個屋簷下。店面（靜態網頁）是客人看到的門面；後台辦公室（Functions）處理訂單、去翻檔案櫃（D1／KV）。一棟建築、一把鑰匙、一個地址。

text.en: Here is the folder you actually create. Anything in your build output folder (here public/) is served as a static file. Anything in functions/ becomes server-side code mapped to a URL.
text.zh: 這是你實際會建立的資料夾。放在「建置輸出資料夾」（這裡是 public/）的東西，都會被當成靜態檔案直接送出；放在 functions/ 裡的，則會變成對應到某個網址的後端程式碼。

blocks.body:
my-fullstack-app/
├── public/            # static front-end (served as-is)
│   └── index.html
├── functions/         # each file = one API route
│   └── api/
│       └── hello.js   # -> /api/hello
├── schema.sql         # D1 table + seed data
└── wrangler.toml      # bindings + build output dir

text.en: Files in public/ (HTML, CSS, JS, images) are cached and served from Cloudflare's edge worldwide.
text.zh: public/ 裡的檔案（HTML、CSS、JS、圖片）會被快取，並從 Cloudflare 全球邊緣節點直接送出。

text.en: functions/api/hello.js automatically answers /api/hello. The file path becomes the URL path.
text.zh: functions/api/hello.js 會自動回應 /api/hello。檔案的路徑，就等於網址的路徑。

text.en: A binding is a named handle (e.g. env.DB, env.CACHE) that connects a Function to D1 or KV — no connection strings.
text.zh: 綁定就是一個有名字的把手（例如 env.DB、env.CACHE），把 Function 接到 D1 或 KV——不用連線字串、不用密碼。

text.en: Push to git (or run one command) and the static site + Functions go live together at the same domain.
text.zh: 推上 git（或跑一行指令），靜態網站和 Functions 就會一起上線、掛在同一個網域下。

heading.en: From git push to a live request
heading.zh: 從 git push 到請求上線

text.en: When you connect your repo, every push triggers a build. Pages compiles your front-end, bundles the functions/ folder, and deploys both. After that, the edge decides per-request: serve a static file, or run a Function.
text.zh: 當你把 repo 連上 Pages 後，每次 push 都會觸發一次建置（build）。Pages 會編譯前端、把 functions/ 資料夾打包起來，然後一起部署。之後邊緣節點會「逐一請求」判斷：要回傳靜態檔案，還是執行一個 Function。

code.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Dev as Developer
  participant Git as GitHub
  participant Pages as "Pages build"
  participant Edge as "Cloudflare edge"
  participant User as Browser
  Dev->>Git: git push
  Git->>Pages: webhook triggers build
  Pages->>Pages: run build command
  Pages->>Edge: deploy assets + Functions
  User->>Edge: GET /
  Edge-->>User: index.html (static)
  User->>Edge: GET /api/hello
  Edge-->>User: JSON from Function
code.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Dev as "開發者"
  participant Git as GitHub
  participant Pages as "Pages 建置"
  participant Edge as "Cloudflare 邊緣"
  participant User as "瀏覽器"
  Dev->>Git: git push
  Git->>Pages: webhook 觸發建置
  Pages->>Pages: 執行建置指令
  Pages->>Edge: 部署靜態檔案 + Functions
  User->>Edge: GET /
  Edge-->>User: index.html (靜態)
  User->>Edge: GET /api/hello
  Edge-->>User: Function 回傳 JSON

text.en: We'll create a tiny page that fetches /api/hello, a Function that reads a name from D1 and counts hits in KV, the bindings, and the deploy. Three layers — front-end, Function, data — all in one project.
text.zh: 我們會做一個小網頁去抓 /api/hello、一個從 D1 讀名字並用 KV 計數的 Function、把綁定設好、再部署。前端、Function、資料層三邊，全部塞進同一個專案。

text.en: Put this in public/index.html. The fetch('/api/hello') is same-origin — no CORS, no full URL — because the API lives in the same project.
text.zh: 把這段放進 public/index.html。fetch('/api/hello') 是同源請求（same-origin）——不用處理 CORS、不用寫完整網址——因為 API 就住在同一個專案裡。

code.body: Loading…

text.en: Create functions/api/hello.js. The export name onRequest handles every HTTP method; context.env holds your bindings. (Use onRequestGet / onRequestPost to handle a single method.)
text.zh: 建立 functions/api/hello.js。匯出的 onRequest 會處理所有 HTTP 方法；context.env 就握著你的綁定。（想只處理單一方法，就用 onRequestGet／onRequestPost。）

text.en: Make a D1 database and a KV namespace, then seed the table. Save the SQL below as schema.sql first.
text.zh: 建立一個 D1 資料庫和一個 KV 命名空間，然後把資料表灌進去。先把下面的 SQL 存成 schema.sql。

text.en: Wrangler prints an id for each — copy them into wrangler.toml in the next step. --remote runs against the real cloud database.
text.zh: Wrangler 會各印出一組 id——把它們複製到下一步的 wrangler.toml。--remote 代表對雲端上真正的資料庫執行。

code.body:
npx wrangler d1 create my-app-db
npx wrangler kv namespace create CACHE

# seed the D1 table from your SQL file
npx wrangler d1 execute my-app-db --remote --file=./schema.sql

title.en: Bind D1 + KV to the project
title.zh: 把 D1 + KV 綁到專案

text.en: wrangler.toml tells Pages which storage to expose as env.DB and env.CACHE, and which folder is the static output. pages_build_output_dir is what makes this a Pages config.
text.zh: wrangler.toml 告訴 Pages：要把哪些儲存以 env.DB、env.CACHE 的名字交給 Functions，以及哪個資料夾是靜態輸出。pages_build_output_dir 這一行，正是它被視為 Pages 設定的關鍵。

code.body:
name = "my-fullstack-app"
pages_build_output_dir = "./public"
compatibility_date = "2025-01-01"

# D1 -> reachable in Functions as env.DB
[[d1_databases]]
binding = "DB"
database_name = "my-app-db"
database_id = "<paste-your-d1-id>"

# KV -> reachable in Functions as env.CACHE
[[kv_namespaces]]
binding = "CACHE"
id = "<paste-your-kv-id>"

text.en: For plain HTML there's nothing to compile, so the build command is blank and the output is public/. For a framework (Vite/React) you'd set a build command and point the output at dist/. These live in the Pages dashboard under Settings > Builds, or in wrangler.toml.
text.zh: 純 HTML 沒東西要編譯，所以建置指令留空、輸出設成 public/。如果是框架（Vite／React），就設好建置指令、把輸出指向 dist/。這些設定在 Pages 儀表板的 Settings > Builds，或寫在 wrangler.toml 裡。

code.body:
# Pages build settings (dashboard, or wrangler.toml)
Build command:           (blank for plain static, or: npm run build)
Build output directory:  public      # plain HTML/CSS/JS
Root directory:          /

# For a Vite / React app instead:
#   Build command:          npm run build
#   Build output directory: dist

text.en: Direct deploy uploads the folder right now. Git-connected is the real workflow: connect the repo once in the dashboard, set the build command + output dir, and every push to your production branch auto-builds and deploys.
text.zh: 直接部署（direct deploy）會立刻把資料夾上傳。Git 連動才是正式做法：在儀表板把 repo 連一次、設好建置指令與輸出資料夾，之後每次 push 到正式分支，都會自動建置並部署。

code.body:
# Option A: direct deploy (great for a quick first try)
npx wrangler pages deploy ./public

# Option B: git-connected (recommended)
#   1. Push your repo to GitHub/GitLab
#   2. Cloudflare dashboard > Workers & Pages > Create > Pages > Connect to Git
#   3. Set build command + output dir, add D1/KV bindings
#   4. Every push to main now builds & deploys automatically
git push origin main

text.en: A common question: should I use Pages Functions or a standalone Worker? Quick rule below.
text.zh: 最常見的疑問：到底該用 Pages Functions，還是獨立的 Worker？下面這張圖給你一個快速判斷準則。

title.zh: Pages Functions 與獨立 Worker 怎麼選

code.en:
flowchart TD
  Q["Need to host a website too?"] -->|"Yes: front-end + API"| PF["Use Pages + Functions"]
  Q -->|"No: API only"| WK["Use a standalone Worker"]
  PF --> ONE["One repo, one deploy"]
  WK --> API["Pure backend service"]
code.zh:
flowchart TD
  Q["也要同時架網站嗎？"] -->|"要：前端 + API"| PF["用 Pages + Functions"]
  Q -->|"不用：只要 API"| WK["用獨立的 Worker"]
  PF --> ONE["一個 repo、一次部署"]
  WK --> API["純後端服務"]

title.zh: Pages 與 Workers 的差別

text.en: Pages is front-end hosting with optional Functions bolted on; a Worker is pure code with no built-in static hosting. Pages Functions actually run ON Workers under the hood.
text.zh: Pages 本質是「前端網站托管」，再外掛 Functions 當後端；Worker 則是「純程式碼」、本身不附帶靜態托管。其實 Pages Functions 底層就是跑在 Workers 上的。

text.en: functions/api/hello.js answers /api/hello. [id].js matches one segment (e.g. /users/42); [[route]].js is a catch-all that matches any depth.
text.zh: functions/api/hello.js 對應 /api/hello。[id].js 只接一段路徑（例如 /users/42）；[[route]].js 是 catch-all，後面接幾層都吃得下。

text.en: Export onRequest for all methods, or onRequestGet / onRequestPost / onRequestPut / onRequestDelete to handle just one HTTP verb.
text.zh: 匯出 onRequest 處理所有方法；或用 onRequestGet／onRequestPost／onRequestPut／onRequestDelete 各自對應一個 HTTP 動詞。

text.en: Each handler gets context with env (bindings), params (dynamic route values), request, next (middleware), and waitUntil (background work).
text.zh: 每個處理器都會拿到 context，裡面有 env（綁定）、params（動態路由的值）、request、next（中介層 middleware）和 waitUntil（背景工作）。

text.en: Bindings give a Function direct, authenticated access to D1/KV/R2 via env.NAME. No connection strings or passwords in your code.
text.zh: 綁定讓 Function 透過 env.NAME 直接、已驗證地存取 D1／KV／R2。程式碼裡不會出現連線字串或密碼。

text.en: A _middleware.js in a folder runs before its routes — perfect for auth or logging. Call context.next() to continue to the matched Function.
text.zh: 資料夾裡的 _middleware.js 會在該層路由之前先跑——很適合做驗證或記錄。呼叫 context.next() 就會繼續往下交給命中的 Function。

text.en: Don't put functions/ inside your build output folder. Pages reads functions/ separately to build routes; if your front-end build wipes or relocates it, your /api/* routes silently vanish.
text.zh: 別把 functions/ 放進「建置輸出資料夾」裡。Pages 會「另外」讀 functions/ 來產生路由；如果你的前端建置流程清空或搬動了它，你的 /api/* 路由就會無聲無息地消失。

en: Bindings must be added for BOTH Production and Preview environments in the dashboard, or your preview deploys will throw 'undefined' on env.DB.
Run the whole thing locally with: npx wrangler pages dev ./public — it serves static files and Functions together with your bindings.
Function invocations count toward your Workers quota: the free plan includes 100,000 requests per day.
Free plan: 500 builds per month, up to 20,000 files per deploy, and 25 MiB per asset.
Use D1 for relational/SQL data, KV for fast key lookups and caching, and R2 for large files.
zh: 綁定要在儀表板裡幫「正式（Production）」和「預覽（Preview）」兩個環境都各加一次，否則預覽部署在 env.DB 會炸出 undefined。
用這行在本機整包跑起來：npx wrangler pages dev ./public——它會把靜態檔案、Functions 和你的綁定一起服務。
Function 的呼叫次數會算進你的 Workers 額度：免費方案每天含 100,000 次請求。
免費方案：每月 500 次建置、每次部署最多 20,000 個檔案、單一檔案上限 25 MiB。
關聯式／SQL 資料用 D1；快速鍵值查找與快取用 KV；大型檔案則交給 R2。

text.en: You can ship a pure static site today and add your first Function later just by creating functions/api/hello.js. Nothing else changes — same project, same deploy.
text.zh: 你今天可以先上一個純靜態網站，之後想加第一個後端，只要新增 functions/api/hello.js 就好。其他什麼都不用改——同一個專案、同一條部署。

label.zh: 用 Worker 做 REST API
